(async()=>{[...document.body.children].forEach(el=>{const cs=getComputedStyle(el);if(cs.position==='fixed'&&parseInt(cs.zIndex||0)>40)el.remove()});const v=document.getElementById('view-mermas');v.classList.add('active');v.style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(x=>{if(x!==v)x.classList.remove('active')});const l=document.getElementById('listMermas');l.innerHTML=Array.from({length:4},(_,i)=>`
PRODUCTO DE PRUEBA LARGO ${i+1}
775024325303${i}
−40.0undde 50
✓ 10 ya recuperadas⚠ 99d sin resolver
📍 ZONA-0211/7/2026
`).join('');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));const card=l.querySelector('.merma-card');return{cardW:Math.round(card.getBoundingClientRect().width),phAfter:getComputedStyle(l.querySelector('.merma-thumb.placeholder'),'::after').maskImage.slice(0,30)};})()
